title: fix failing image e2e test
body:
The timestamps of some images must have changed changing the number of
expected filtered images.  The test conditions seem fragile but for now
it's more important to get CI back.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

I was now struck by the e2e test for multiple network aliases.  It should now be fixed with the second commit.
The network alias test is still failing on ubuntu
